name: Round Faux Wood Lamp Base Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add extra interest to your indoor lighting with this Round Faux Wood Lamp Base from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Made from faux wood material, the round lamp base features soft textured detailing for a stylish look that coordinates with any decor. The on/off light setting with a rotary socket switch allows for easy function, while the 5-foot cord gives you the freedom to place it wherever you want.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
